item.title: LangGraph adds multi-agent orchestration runtime for production
item.description: LangGraph ships a production-grade runtime for multi-agent orchestration and workflows.

item.title: New SWE-bench benchmark evaluates coding agents at scale
item.description: A refreshed SWE-bench leaderboard evaluates how coding agents perform across repositories.

item.title: Prompt injection attack bypasses guardrails, OWASP issues warning
item.description: Researchers show a prompt injection that bypasses agent guardrails; OWASP updates its security guidance.
